series_description: Printed matter published by state agencies for fistribution to the public.
retention_statement: Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the re- quirements of O.R.C 149.11

series_description: These files contain information about OLRS budgets, activities, employees, policies, and other administrative information necessary for supervisors to administer and supervise the agency's activities including Advisory Committee, state plans, annual reports, status of activities, meeting notes, etc. These files are retained by the supervisory personnel including the Director for easy access to information about the agency necessary to administer and supervise its activities

Records inventory and analysis worksheet: Used for conducting an inventory of an agency's record series. Requests vital information to be used in determining the retention period and disposition of a record.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded by an up- dated inventory or until record series is no longer created

series_description: Executive Budget Proposal: Table 2-Federal Grants and State Match Detail; Table 4-Continuation, Required or Expanded Proposal; Table 4s-Continuation (C), required (R), Expanded (E); Table 5-Equipment Schedule; Table C-1 Capital Project Proposal.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after the end of biennium

series_title: GAF-29 Claim For Reissuance of Voided Wa
series_description: Forms used to reissue another warrant once a warrant has been voided.
General ledger records.
Authorizes payment to another state agency for goods and/or services received and services as the basis for disbursing funds.
Internal form used to obtain authorization for out-of-state travel for a state employee.

Computer printout in two parts listing all employees by agency, employee name, social security number and other pertinent payroll informatin. White copy is corrected and returned to DAS/Payroll Sys- tems. Yellow copy is retained in agency. Payroll lett
Request for stop/release of warrant.

series_title: GAF-84 Revenue Receipts and Holding Acco
series_description: Revenue Receipts and Holding Account Redistribu- tion. Used to deposit and record revenue receipts from any known revenue source and to hold unknown receipts for redistribution. Also used by agencies which have established a departmental holding fund fr

Used to transfer appropriations at the Spending Authority Code (SAC) level on the Central Accounting System between quarters of the fiscal year if they are within the same appropriation line item of an appropriation bill.
A form used to identify the length of time a record must be retained before final disposition.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded by a revised retention schedule, or until record series in no longer created

series_description: The purpose of this record sereis is to document original intake information on requests for assistance/investigation of potential case with client name, address, type of case, staff assigned to case, important facts, activities on case, various information pertaining to case, including disposition of case.
This series show the date, amount of expenditures or encumbrances, and balance remaining for each major and minor account.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until monthly recap is received

series_description: The purpose of this series is to maintain individual and agency names and addresses for sesimination of substantive information regarding mental health and developmental diasability advocacy.
All records which document or are the basis for a payroll including time reports, activity sheets, time cards, overtime, com- pensation time, flextime authorizations, and leave requests.
Allows state agencies to establish or increase appropriation authority in special funds.
Used to establish a grant master plan in CAS. Provides a profile of the grant. Enables the system to collect financial totals for a grant.
Copies of term contracts entered into by the Division of Purchasing on behalf of all agencies of the state of Ohio.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superceded by new term contracts

series_description: (Except Payrolls) Used to cancel a warrant issued by an agency in error.
Printouts listing all warrants printed by the Auditor of State.
Application and affidivat for replacement of warrants never received: Form used when warrant does not reach the receiver.

series_title: GAF-25 CAS Reports & Inquiries by Data C
series_description: These are various computer generated reports dis- tributed by OBM to various state agencies. They fall into the following class ifications: a. Appropriation; b. Trial Balance; c. Vendor; d. Grant; e. Cap- ital Project; f. Revenue; g. Spending; h. Cash

series_title: GAF-44 Federal or State Audit Reports
series_description: Copies of audit reports issued by the Auditor of State or federal government.
Used by OBM to define allocation units and by agencies to define their Spending Authority Codes (SACs).
Forms used by a person/organization to enter into contract with an agency to request payment for services rendered or to amend contract. May include attendance forms, correspondence, etc.
(Continuation Sheet) Contination sheet for add- itional purchases or contract encumbrance.
Claims and Litigation Records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years after case is closed

series_description: Organizational Charts.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released

series_description: Used to request installation or modificattion of any equipment or service provided by telephone company.
The purpose of this series is to provide information on Title XX contracts and administration of Title XX subcontracts and operation of local Title XX programs funded by agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years after receipt of federal and state audit reports or until next state audit, whichever is later

series_description: Represents an agency's intent to purchase goods and/or services; it reserves appropriation funds for future spending until the funds are formally obligated (encumbered).
All forms used to authorize deductions for charitable organizations, credit unions, U.S. Savings Bonds, or direct deposit

Used to make emergency purchases of all materials, supplies, and equipment and to make direct purchases or engage in contracts of services that might include materials that are not professional, technical, or advisory in nature.
Publications produces by an agency detailing operations, regulations, and/or procedures of an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. Destroy if superseded and of no historical value to State Archives.

series_description: Includes mailing lists, directories, rosters, and registers compiled by an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Form used to change the address or other inform- ation on a warrant.
(Central Office Supply Order Form) May encumber funds for purchases from other state agencies that involve procurement of supplies, equimpent, or standard forms.
(Alteration) Used to modify informaiton already established on a previous purchase order.
Used to certify the destruction or transfer of records according to an approved records retention schedule.
The purpose of this series is to keep purchase orders, Interstate Transfer Vouchers (ISTV's), contract encumbrances, printing orders and controlling and emergency board requests.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years after receipt of state and federal audit reports or until next state audit, whichever is later

series_description: To request Controlling Board approval of emergency expenditures for Capital Improvement Projects, purchases made without bidwaiver, and transfer of Capital Improvement Funds.

This series contains copies of OLRS newsletter desiminated to governement agencies and to private agencies and individuals to let them know about Mental Health and Developmental Disability advocacy efforts and OLRS activities.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain at least two copies of each newsletter permanently

series_description: This journal shows all pertinent employee and payroll information for each two week period, including name, classification, step, gross pay, deductions, net pay, leave, etc
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 10 years after receipt of federal and state audit reports or until next audit, whichever is later

series_description: APPLICATION AND AFFIDAVAT FOR REPLACEMENT OF WARRANTS LOST, STOLEN, OR DESTROYED: Used when payee has received a warrant and it has been lost, stolen, or destroyed.
Balance sheets.
Continuation sheet for CAS documents. (Formerly encumbrance Coding Traveler.)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain as long as attached CAS doc- ument

series_description: Reserves funds and formally recognizes the State's obligation to pay for miscellaneous goods and/or services that require no other formal approval. Used so funds will not lapse.
All records concerning federal grants to state agencies which document the expenditure and use of federal monies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until state and federal audits have been conducted, audit reports released, and audit resol- utions issued or resolved. Review by State Archives for possible transfer. Destroy if of no histor- ical value to State Archives.

series_description: Used to order supplies and/or services and may be used to encumber funds for a purchase from another state agency.
(Accounts Payable Invoices) Bill for goods shipped or servcies rendered. They are matched with purchase orders and rec- eiving reports, and attached to vouchers for payment.
Petty Case Records.
Used to record receipts or repayment where the original payment was in error, duplicated or made illegally.
Used for the salvage of equipment or property of the state of Ohio.

Agencies use this form to: A: Request a new re- port. B. Delete a report. C. Change the medium, frequency, or number of copies of reports already received. D. Order an "on request" report (not produced on a regular basis). E. Order a report not re
List of all positions within an agency by position control number, including both filled and vacant positions. Used for budget and personnel purposes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded by a new roster

series_description: Expenditures documents. Authorize payment to a vendor other than a state agency for goods and/or servcies received.

The purpose of this system is to retain copies of forms showing payment to outside private/public companies and organizations for goods and services warranted and reimbursement to state workers from this agency for cost of travel expenses, and to retain information regarding state and federal forms management, outstanding encumbrances, state legislature, budget information, monthly recap of daily transaction registers, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years after receipt of federal and state audit reports or until next audit, whichever is later

series_description: This series contains all current and past employee forms, individual personnel actions, benefits, forms and benefits information, performance evaluations, position descriptions, withholding information and W/2 forms. This also contains hiring information, resumes and sometimes reference of applicants for employment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year after end of fiscal year in which employee is terminated or in which applicant applied

series_description: An order for goods and services by a state agency from a specified outside vendor or seller (other than another state agency). It represents an obligation to pay for goods or services and formally encum- bers the funds to do so.

series_title: GAF-77 Refund of Expenditure Within the
series_description: Refund of expenditure within the biennium for prior year. Used to record receipts or repayment where the original payment was in error, duplicated, or made illegally. This is done within the biennium for the prior year.
Original computer printout, instructions and work sheets used to complete equipment inventory reports.
Includes exhibits, movies, and videotape productions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until information is no longer current. Review by State Archives for possible transfer. Destroy if on no historical value to State Archives.

series_description: Used for input in the statewide computer system and to gain approval of all state forms from State Forms Center at DAS Information Management.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years after form is obsolete

series_description: The purpose of this record series is to keep all information pertaining to current, open client cases that are being handled by OLRS staff. Information within may include all or part of the following: questionnaire pertaining to background of client, requests for assistance, all correspondence, copies of various legal pleadings, investigation reports, attorney's notes, and medical records.

These sheets list the employee's name and number of hours the employee worked in a two week period including amount of sick leave, vacation, holiday or personnel or other leave the employee has taken. The sheets are signed and are used to figure payroll.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years after receipt of state and federal audit reports or until next audit, whichever is later

series_description: Bank receipt verifying the amount deposited into a bank account.
Voucher Journals
The purpose of this series is to keep information about personal service contracts entered into by OLRS.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 15 years after the end of the state fiscal year in which contracts terminates or one year after receipt of fiscal state and federal audit reports, whichever is later

series_description: The purpose of this record series is to keep all information pertaining to closed cases that were handled by OLRS staff. Information contained within may include all or part of the following: questionnaire pertaining to background of client, requests for assistance, all correspondence, copies of various legal pleadings, investigation reports, attorney's notes, and medical records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five years from date of last activity on case

series_description: Obligates funds for personal serivce, rental agree ments and capital improvements.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years after expiration of the contract

series_description: Agencies use this form to summarize all out-of- state travel done by personnel for each quarter.
Payroll Warrant Cancellation Advise & Transmittal. Used to cancel a payroll warrant issued by an agency in error.

series_title: GA-17 Minutes of Agency Staff Meetings
series_description: Minutes and supporting records documenting internal policy decisions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five years. Review by State Archives for possible transfer. Destroy if of no historical value to State Archives.

series_description: This series contains copies of starff correspondence, routinely typed headings, case lists, group addresses, administrative resources information, records regarding resources available that agency has, who has received manuals and resources requested. This information is basically information used by support staff to allow for efficiency in typing, addressing and xeroxing.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain oney year after end of fiscal year in which created or until obsolete, whichever is later

series_description: The purpose of this record series is to retain information on current requests for assistance being handled by agency of client name, address, type of case, staff assigned to case, important facts, activities on case, various information pertaining to case curently being handled by OLRS.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until case is closed or request for assistance is handled

series_description: These ledgers show details of receipts and disbursements of agency's funds showing a running balance of each fund.

The purpose of this series is to keep substantial information pertaining to mental health (MH) and developmental disabilities (DD). This series includes research on issues; resource materials; legislation; MH & DD policies; institutional information such as staffing patterns, and programming; reported and unreported legal cases and research and unreported legal cases and research; meeting notes. Issues covered might include any issue affecting OLRS clientele, such as housing, employment, discrimination, community MH/MR services, special education, sterilization, institutional conditions, abuse, nursing home, etc. The ultimate purpose is to have information pertinent to and helpful for requests for information or assistance.
Worksheet used for proposed budgets.
Statements and cancelled checks reflecting an agency's financial status with bank.
Cash Receipt Records.
Used as a management tool for one-time expenses not covered by DAS Directives.
Lists each employe receiving a pay warrant, warrant number, amount paid, and other pertinent payroll information.

series_title: GAF-26 Cash in Treasury Detail Ledger
series_description: Cash in Treasury Detail Ledger

series_title: GAF-82 Request for Transfer of General
series_description: Request for Transfer of General Appropriation and Reallotment of Quarters. Allows state agencies to transfer funds between appropriation line items. O.R.c. 127.13
Also includes other published periodic reports on agency activities.
retention_statement: Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the re- quirements of O.R.C. 149.11

series_description: Correspondence of the head of an agency (Director, Chief, Secretary, Commissioner, and their deputies), dealing with all aspects of the administration of their offices. Correspondence in cludes information concerning agency policies, procedures, program,
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four years. Review by State Archives for possible transfer. Destroy if of no historical value to State Archives.

series_description: Used for claiming reimbursement for in-state and out-of-state travel.
Used to establish descriptive information about a vendor or update previously entered vendor data.

Includes internal correspondence (letters, memos); also, correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal intrepreations and other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years, or until audited by the Auditor of State and audit report is released

series_description: Includes published reports, unpublished substan- tive reports and policy studies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Aduitor of State and audit report is released. Destroy if superseded and of no historical value to State Archives.
